message:
fix(persistent_ds): clamp regressed timestamps in VersionedStore::push to preserve sort order

Replace debug_assert panic with timestamp clamping when push() receives
a timestamp older than the last entry. This preserves the monotonic
non-decreasing invariant required by at_timestamp binary search, instead
of panicking in debug builds and silently corrupting ordering in release.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
